name: Design Before Build
summary: Pre-code design gate that forces context exploration, structured questioning, alternatives, and approval before implementation.
purpose: Prevent premature coding by requiring an approved design and explicit open-question resolution first.
implementation_notes: Port the hard gate and review loop; drop tool-specific browser companion behavior unless Tall Talents adds it.

name: Implementation Planning
summary: Turns approved specs into exact, bite-sized tasks with file paths, tests, commands, and acceptance criteria.
purpose: Produce execution-ready plans that another agent or engineer can follow without filling in missing details.
implementation_notes: Merge Superpowers’ no-placeholder rigor with Agency’s spec quoting, scope realism, and acceptance-criteria structure.

name: Plan Execution
summary: Executes an existing implementation plan faithfully, with critical review before work starts and verification as tasks complete.
purpose: Provide a reliable non-subagent execution path for written plans.
implementation_notes: Keep the process intact; only neutralize tool-specific references.

name: Subagent Task Loop
summary: Task-scoped execution loop using a fresh implementer plus mandatory spec and code-quality review loops.
purpose: Raise implementation quality while keeping controller context small and task focus sharp.
implementation_notes: Use Superpowers for the per-task mechanics and Agency for retry/state management language.

name: Parallel Agent Dispatch
summary: Runs independent workstreams concurrently without sharing unnecessary context or overlapping write scopes.
purpose: Improve throughput on unrelated investigations or tasks without creating coordination chaos.
implementation_notes: Keep the strict independence test and focused task-prompt structure.

name: Workflow Orchestration
summary: Program-level delivery orchestration with phase gates, retry limits, status reporting, and escalation paths.
purpose: Turn collections of specialist talents into a controlled delivery system.
implementation_notes: Strip NEXUS branding and preserve the gate/retry/state machine logic.

name: Handoff Contracts
summary: Reusable templates for standard handoffs, QA verdicts, escalations, and phase transitions.
purpose: Reduce context loss and improve reliability at every transfer boundary.
implementation_notes: Preserve the metadata, evidence, retry-instruction, and decision-needed sections.

name: Systematic Debugging
summary: Root-cause-first debugging process with explicit investigation, pattern analysis, hypothesis testing, and only then fixes.
purpose: Replace random patching with evidence-led debugging.
implementation_notes: This is already a durable process talent with minimal adaptation needed.

name: Test-First Delivery
summary: A real red-green-refactor loop that requires observing failure before trusting a test.
purpose: Ensure behavior changes are driven by tests rather than retrofitted after implementation.
implementation_notes: Keep the explicit failure verification step and anti-rationalization language.

name: Verification Gate
summary: No success claim without fresh proof from the full verifying command or artifact.
purpose: Prevent false completion claims and force evidence-backed status reporting.
implementation_notes: Merge Superpowers’ proving-command gate with Agency’s skeptical readiness posture.

name: Code Review
summary: Plan-aware, severity-ranked review flow for correctness, security, maintainability, performance, and tests.
purpose: Catch issues before they compound and give actionable review output tied to the plan.
implementation_notes: Keep the diff/base/head framing from Superpowers and the severity/comment format from Agency.

name: Review Feedback Triage
summary: Technical evaluation workflow for incoming review feedback before agreeing, pushing back, or implementing.
purpose: Improve engineering rigor and stop performative agreement.
implementation_notes: Keep the response pattern and forbidden-response rules almost unchanged.

name: Worktree Isolation
original_names: Codex App Compatibility: Worktree and Finishing Skill Adaptation
summary: Safe isolated workspace setup with ignore checks, setup auto-detection, and baseline verification.
purpose: Reduce branch/workspace contamination and establish a clean starting point for implementation.
implementation_notes: Add environment detection so the talent can skip manual worktree creation when the harness already isolates work.

name: Branch Finish Workflow
summary: Structured end-of-branch workflow: verify tests, choose disposition, execute choice, clean up safely.
purpose: Make the final integration step explicit and low-risk.
implementation_notes: Keep the exact four-option decision flow and destructive-action confirmation.

name: Minimal Diff Execution
summary: Implementation discipline centered on the smallest justifiable diff and explicit refusal of scope creep.
purpose: Keep targeted changes reviewable, low-risk, and faithful to the request.
implementation_notes: Very strong direct port candidate; preserve the line-by-line justification test and follow-up list.

name: Architecture Decisioning
summary: Trade-off-driven architecture talent with ADRs, domain boundaries, and quality-attribute analysis.
purpose: Produce maintainable, reversible, domain-first architectural direction.
implementation_notes: Merge ADR rigor with service/data architecture coverage; avoid turning it into abstract generic architecture advice.

name: Repo Onboarding Map
summary: Facts-only orientation map for unfamiliar codebases, including entry points, data flow, and inspected-file boundaries.
purpose: Reduce onboarding time and support safe later edits by improving source-grounded understanding.
implementation_notes: Preserve the three-level output format and read-only/facts-only constraint.

name: Documentation Pass
summary: Audience-first docs workflow for README, API docs, tutorials, and docs-as-code maintenance.
purpose: Create or repair documentation that is accurate, navigable, and testable.
implementation_notes: Keep the workflow and templates; trim bulky sample content and persona language.

name: Security Review
summary: Threat modeling and secure-code/architecture review across auth, validation, trust boundaries, and dependencies.
purpose: Catch and remediate security risks early in design and implementation.
implementation_notes: Keep the phased workflow and threat-model structure; remove heavy sample code blocks.

name: DevOps Automation
summary: CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, monitoring, rollback, and reliability automation for production systems.
purpose: Improve delivery speed and system reliability while keeping operations observable and reversible.
implementation_notes: Merge pipeline automation and infrastructure reliability into one ops-focused talent without cloud-vendor bias.

name: Incident Response
summary: Structured incident handling with severity classes, roles, communication cadence, remediation paths, and blameless post-mortems.
purpose: Turn production chaos into a repeatable response system.
implementation_notes: Preserve the severity matrix, role assignment, and post-mortem template.

name: Release Readiness Audit
summary: Skeptical final ship/no-ship audit that defaults to 'needs work' until evidence proves readiness.
purpose: Provide a disciplined final gate for production readiness decisions.
implementation_notes: Keep the skeptical posture and evidence matrix; replace repo-specific screenshot scripts with generalized evidence requirements.

name: Visual Evidence QA
summary: Visual-first QA discipline centered on screenshots, interaction evidence, and realistic quality ratings.
purpose: Ground UI QA in proof rather than optimistic claims.
implementation_notes: Keep the evidence-first posture and issue-report structure; neutralize Playwright-specific scripts.

name: API Validation
summary: Comprehensive API testing across functional behavior, auth/security, failure handling, and performance.
purpose: Raise confidence in APIs and integrations before release.
implementation_notes: Port the validation matrix and workflow, not the large sample code payloads.

name: Performance Benchmarking
summary: Baseline, load, stress, endurance, and SLA-focused performance analysis with bottleneck reporting.
purpose: Make performance work measurable and decision-ready.
implementation_notes: Preserve the baseline-first method and report structure; let user SLAs replace hardcoded thresholds.

name: Product Requirements
summary: PRD and opportunity-assessment talent tying goals, non-goals, users, solution framing, and launch intent together.
purpose: Translate user and business needs into a usable product definition artifact.
implementation_notes: Keep the PRD and opportunity-assessment shape; drop the persona wrapper.

name: Sprint Prioritization
summary: Backlog prioritization and sprint shaping using RICE, capacity, dependency mapping, and realistic task sizing.
purpose: Help teams choose the right work and shape it into something actually deliverable.
implementation_notes: Merge prioritization frameworks with grounded spec-to-task conversion rules.

name: Feedback Synthesis
summary: Multi-channel feedback analysis that turns qualitative input into themes, priorities, and actionable product insight.
purpose: Convert raw user voice into decision-grade product evidence.
implementation_notes: Port the collection-processing-synthesis method without the enterprise analytics sprawl.

name: Trend Research
summary: Market, competitor, and emerging-signal research for product and strategy decisions.
purpose: Bring outside-world evidence into product and roadmap choices.
implementation_notes: Merge Agency’s market-research role with the Phase 0 gate mindset.

name: UX Research
summary: Evidence-led usability and behavior research for user-facing decision making.
purpose: Ground interface and journey choices in observed user behavior and validated pain points.
implementation_notes: Keep the evidence bias and journey framing; trim role/personality language.

name: UX Foundation
summary: Implementation-oriented UX structure talent for layouts, component systems, and developer-friendly foundations.
purpose: Bridge user-facing intent into a workable front-end structure before styling and polish.
implementation_notes: Merge structural UX work with implementation realism, not visual-style direction.

name: Compliance Review
summary: Regulatory and legal scan talent for privacy, content, operational risk, and launch conditions.
purpose: Surface compliance blockers, required controls, and audit-trail obligations before release.
implementation_notes: Keep the audit logic and control questions; remove heavy sample code and jurisdiction-specific verbosity.

name: Workflow Mapping
summary: Maps complete workflow trees, states, failure paths, handoff contracts, and registries before or alongside implementation.
purpose: Make complex system behavior explicit enough to build, QA, and operate safely.
implementation_notes: Preserve discovery-first workflow mapping and the insistence on non-happy-path branches.

name: Automation Governance
summary: Governance-first talent for deciding whether and how automation should exist, including risk, fallback, and testing standards.
purpose: Stop low-value or unsafe automations and standardize the ones worth building.
implementation_notes: This ports well once n8n bias is softened and the verdict framework is kept intact.

name: Executive Briefing
summary: Condenses complex findings into quantified, decision-ready executive communication.
purpose: Help technical or research work land with decision-makers who need concise, structured output.
implementation_notes: Keep the strict output contract and quantified recommendation style; remove consulting-brand framing.
